'''鈭歬-l-ng-zh''' ('''kakalngezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voicemog|voicemog]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voicemog|voicemog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-l-ng-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kakalngezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikalngezhoko|thikalngezhoko]] || [[word:jikalngezhoko|jikalngezhoko]] || [[word:shikalngezhoko|shikalngezhoko]] || [[word:kikalngezhoko|kikalngezhoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
